text:
Rod Reiss is a wealthy man and the father of Frieda and Historia Reiss.

Appearance

Rod is typically seen wearing a white button-front shirt with a black pullover vest, loose black pants and black dress shoes.

Personality

Story

Years ago, Rod had an affair which resulted in Historia's birth. His daughters apparently lived together before Rod sent Historia away with her maternal grandparents, gave her a new name and wishing to never see her again. He allowed Frieda to work in her sister's school but ordered her not to reveal their family link.

Relationships
 
Frieda Reiss 

References

Navigation
